title: astragalus hornii var. hornii
intro: Astragalus hornii var. hornii, also known as the Korean astragalus or Chinese milk vetch, is a type of flowering plant in the legume family that is native to East Asia. The plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for centuries, valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and immune-boosting effects. The health benefits of Astragalus hornii var. hornii include reducing stress and fatigue, improving cardiovascular health, and enhancing overall immune function. Astragalus hornii var. hornii can be prepared as a herbal tea, capsule, or powder, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
